candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Production and project costs
candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears as a component beneath the already selected parent row 'Production and project costs'. The nearby 'Production and project costs - Balancing value' indicates these component rows roll up into the selected total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Production and project costs
candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it is presented as part of the breakdown of the already selected 'Production and project costs' total. The balancing-value structure shows it is embedded in the selected parent bucket.
Explicit COGS-related amortization line, but it is shown as a sub-component of the selected 'Production and project costs' row rather than a separate same-level expense to add later.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is 'Production and project costs'. The statement shows a clear parent-child structure: the selected total is decomposed into D&A component rows plus 'Production and project costs - Balancing value'. Therefore COGS D&A is already embedded in the selected COGS row and should not be added separately.

candidates.why: This is SG&A-related D&A via distribution/sales costs, but it appears as a component under the already selected parent row 'Sales costs'. The associated balancing-value row indicates it is already included in that selected bucket.
Explicit SG&A-related D&A, but presented as part of the breakdown of the already selected 'Sales costs' row, so separate addition would double count.
Explicit SG&A-related amortization line, but it is nested within the selected 'Sales costs' bucket and therefore already embedded.
Explicit SG&A-related D&A, but shown as a component of the already selected 'Administration costs' total, evidenced by the balancing-value row.
Administration-related D&A line that appears inside the selected 'Administration costs' bucket rather than outside it.
Administration-related amortization line, but it is part of the detailed composition of the selected 'Administration costs' row and should not be added separately.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is the sum of 'Sales costs', 'Administration costs', and 'Other operating expenses'. The statement decomposes 'Sales costs' into distribution D&A lines plus a balancing value, and 'Administration costs' into administration D&A lines plus a balancing value. This indicates the D&A is already embedded in the selected SG&A parent rows. No separate same-level SG&A D&A line should be added. XRD is empty, and no explicit R&D expense row is present, so the special R&D exception does not apply.
